steps.title: Follow the consequence
steps.content: Researchers use heat and chemicals to widen grooves in dry balsa wood. The next sentence describes what happens because of that process: the grooves become wide enough for electrical conductors.

steps.title: Reject other transitions
steps.content: A would introduce an example, but the second sentence gives an outcome. B would point to an earlier time, which is not the relationship. C would signal contrast, though the ideas fit as cause and effect. The answer is D.
